Test name: CBFA (20 km/h)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle travels forwards towards a bicyclist which is crossing in a perpendicular direction from the farside of the vehicle.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/LSS VRU
  • Ego speed: 20 km/h
  • Target speed: 20 km/h
  • Target start distance: 22 m
  • Target distance to obstruction: 1 m
  • Overlap: 50 %
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1 Repetition 2 Repetition 3 Repetition 4
←CBNA (60 km/h) CBFA (20 km/h) CBFA (40 km/h)→


Test Summary

Observations

Mobileye has no detections until the last few meters due to the camera's field of view (FoV), which is much narrower compared to Autobrains (Mobileye has 52 degrees horizontal FoV, while AB has 118.7 degrees). Therefore, in many of the repetitions, Mobileye has few points and only in a distance very close to the target. Repetition 5th has no Mobileye detections. It was recorded a 6th and 7th repetition but there was not any autobrains deteccions in the recording. For this reason, these repetitions were removed.
